URW: Negative Consequences for the West

URW: Negative Consequences for the West

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: amerikans are the greatest pigs on the planet…and that is in the most derogitive term you can imagine.. absolute pigs
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly and harshly criticizes and dehumanizes the people of a Western nation (America), portraying them in an extremely negative light, which aligns with the narrative of discrediting the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement explicitly accuses Western media of presenting a false narrative about the war's progress, thereby undermining its reliability and suggesting it is causing harm.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote explicitly invokes the fear of a full-scale nuclear war and presents it as an almost desirable outcome due to despair, actively amplifying anxieties about catastrophic conflict.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: New Sarah Westall & Scott Ritter: Russia is Winning, Nuclear Threat is a Sign of Desperation
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The title and premise of the discussion directly speculate on the outcome of the war (Russia winning) and the meaning behind strategic threats (nuclear threat as a sign of desperation).

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: thanks mostly to un-elected bureaucrats in all “western countries” they are proving the worst of the worst of humanity
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement attributes negative moral consequences and societal degradation to Western bureaucrats, highlighting a perceived adverse outcome for Western governance and society.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: for the west it’s always been the soviet (RUSSIAN) that has ALWAYS been the boogie man..when in fact they were SELDOM a threat.. amerika always blew any comment about RUSSIA or at later stages CHINA way out of proportion..
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Western (specifically American) foreign policy and perception, portraying it as hysterical, exaggerated, and fundamentally dishonest in its portrayal of Russia as a threat.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: amerikans are the greatest pigs on the planet…and that is in the most derogitive term you can imagine.. absolute pigs
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This is a severe and derogatory criticism of an entire Western nation and its people, attacking their character and moral standing, which aligns with the narrative of discrediting the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: thanks mostly to un-elected bureaucrats in all “western countries” they are proving the worst of the worst of humanity
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The statement blames Western bureaucrats for leading humanity towards ruin, highlighting a negative outcome (moral degradation and potential nuclear war) attributed to Western governance structures.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This directly questions the reliability and motives of Western media, accusing it of presenting a false narrative that has deadly consequences, thereby undermining trust in these sources.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement explicitly evokes fear and fatalistic acceptance of a nuclear war, amplifying anxieties about the conflict's potential catastrophic escalation.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Hidden plots by secret schemes of powerful groups
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: NOBODY asked their populations ..we are just told…but we deserve EVERYTHING we get
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This implies that populations are being led into disaster by unaccountable, powerful forces (governments, bureaucrats) without their consent, suggesting a hidden, undemocratic process driving events.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: for the west it’s always been the soviet (RUSSIAN) that has ALWAYS been the boogie man..when in fact they were SELDOM a threat.. amerika always blew any comment about RUSSIA or at later stages CHINA way out of proportion..
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Western (specifically American) foreign policy as being based on fear-mongering and exaggeration regarding Russia and China, portraying Western diplomatic and security stances as fundamentally dishonest and aggressive.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement explicitly accuses Western media of presenting a false narrative about the war's progress, thereby undermining its credibility and suggesting it is responsible for prolonging the conflict.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: New Sarah Westall & Scott Ritter: Russia is Winning, Nuclear Threat is a Sign of Desperation & Very Serious
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The title and premise of the interview make a definitive claim about who is winning the war ('Russia is Winning') and speculates on the meaning and seriousness of the nuclear threat, fitting the narrative of predicting war outcomes.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement, while framed with fatalistic sarcasm, actively evokes and amplifies fear about the potential for nuclear war and total annihilation as a consequence of the current geopolitical situation.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: thanks mostly to un-elected bureaucrats in all “western countries” they are proving the worst of the worst of humanity
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote highlights a severe negative consequence for Western societies, blaming unelected bureaucrats for leading humanity towards ruin, thus portraying Western governance as corrupt and destructive.
